---
title: Title
author: <hr> Author
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  revealjs::revealjs_presentation:
    self_contained: false
    reveal_plugins: ["notes"]
    includes:
        in_header: img/header.html
    incremental: true
    highlight: pygments
    center: true
    transition: slide
    background_transition: slide
    reveal_options:
      showNotes: true
      slideNumber: true
      previewLinks: true
    fig_width: 8
    fig_height: 6
    fig_caption: true
    css: fmt/styles.css
    mathjax: default
csl: fmt/apa.csl
bibliography: ref.bib
---

```{r eval=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE, paged.print=FALSE}
# Alternative YAML for powerpoint presentations
#title: 'Title'
#date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
#output:
#  powerpoint_presentation:
#    reference_doc: fmt/template_ppt.potx
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE, paged.print=FALSE}
bibliogR::gen_bib()
```


## Agenda

# Section

## Slide
